content: Pipecat production patterns: docs describe a bot-runner HTTP gateway that spawns bot pipelines on demand. Two topologies: (a) bot-per-process/VM (Pipecat Cloud, Fly machine-per-session) for isolation; (b) multi-session single process — one FastAPI app that accepts /api/offer and runs one Pipeline task per connection in the same process (SmallWebRTC dev runner model). For a 1vCPU/2GB Fargate task at ~5 concurrent sessions, multi-session-per-task with in-process pipelines is the fit; sessions are sticky to the answering task by nature of the WebRTC peer connection. Note aiortc SCTP chunk setting is process-global (PIPECAT_SCTP_MAX_CHUNK_SIZE).
